## Bug Fixes & Improvements (Windows)

- **Taskbar / title-bar shows Qt logo instead of D3Macro icon**: `packaging/icons/d3macro.ico` is now pre-generated and committed to the repository, so the icon is always available without a build-time Pillow step that could silently fail. `SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID` is called at startup so Windows correctly associates the window with the EXE's embedded icon in the taskbar and Alt+Tab switcher.
- **Runner restart is slow on Windows** — two-part fix:
  1. `stop_runner()` now waits only 400 ms before force-killing on Windows (was 3 000 ms). Python processes don't handle `WM_CLOSE` from `QProcess.terminate()`, so the old timeout was always fully spent before the kill.
  2. Windows build switched from `--onefile` to `--onedir` so the runner subprocess no longer re-extracts the entire PyInstaller bundle on every launch (was 2–5 s per restart, now < 0.5 s).

## New: Linux → Windows cross-build script

Added `build_windows_from_linux.sh` — build the Windows executable on Arch Linux or any Linux host without installing Windows.

- **Docker mode (default)**: builds inside a Debian container with Wine + Python 3.11 for Windows; no Wine needed on the host (`sudo pacman -S docker`). The Docker image is built once and cached locally.
- **Wine mode**: `BUILD_MODE=wine ./build_windows_from_linux.sh` — uses Wine installed directly on the host (`sudo pacman -S wine`).
